description_long: This is a large, modern residential house complex featuring multiple interconnected structures with flat roofs and clean, geometric lines. The property includes several buildings, a central courtyard, and landscaped areas with numerous trees and greenery. There is a prominent swimming pool and patio area, as well as paved walkways and driveways connecting the different sections. The exterior is finished in light, neutral tones, with large windows and open terraces providing ample natural light. The layout suggests a blend of private and communal spaces, with outdoor seating and recreational zones. The overall design emphasizes openness, luxury, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A spacious, modern multi-building house complex with flat roofs, large windows, and landscaped outdoor areas including a pool and patio.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main building, pool, and patio area, with landscaped greenery and a driveway leading to the property.
description_view_1: From this angle, the central courtyard and dense tree coverage are prominent, with multiple interconnected structures visible.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the rear of the property, including additional buildings, a water tank, and outdoor seating areas.
description_view_3: The front-facing view displays the main entrance, flanked by two large buildings and a row of trees, with the street in the foreground.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide door, steps, and a minimalist overhang, with landscaped approach and no ornate columns.
